title: ADVENTURE TRIPS - 211info
text: ADVENTURES WITHOUT LIMITS ADVENTURE TRIPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outdoor programs for children and adults with all ability levels. Programs include hiking, kayaking, canoeing, rafting, paddleboarding cross-country skiing, snowshoeing, rock climbing, and camping. Offers partner programs and open enrollment trips for those with little or no experience. PO Box #670 Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Age 6 and older Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Services run 7 days per week. Email (503) 359-2568 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 359-2568 Main phone (503) 389-0580 Alternate Main Line (503) 359-2568 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: Programs range between $90-$125 for a full-day trip, including transportation and any needed equipment. Accepted payments include Medicaid, private pay, and contracts with state county agencies. Scholarship applications are available for people with limited income. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ADVENTURES WITHOUT LIMITS
